evidence_gap.summary: Actual maker/taker fees and fee asset are absent for every screenshot row.

raw_observation.summary: Actual maker/taker fees and fee asset are absent for every screenshot row.

evidence_gap.summary: Displayed PnL is screenshot-reported gross-or-unknown only; net PnL cannot be computed.
evidence_gap.schema_need: gross_pnl_usd, fees_usd, spread_cost_usd, slippage_cost_usd, funding_pnl_usd, net_pnl_usd

raw_observation.summary: Displayed PnL is screenshot-reported gross-or-unknown only; net PnL cannot be computed.
raw_observation.schema_need: gross_pnl_usd, fees_usd, spread_cost_usd, slippage_cost_usd, funding_pnl_usd, net_pnl_usd

evidence_gap.summary: Execution Quality shows 0.00 bps slippage, but screenshots do not prove realized spread/slippage.
evidence_gap.schema_need: quote_bid, quote_ask, mark/index, fill_price, observed_at, submitted_at

raw_observation.summary: Execution Quality shows 0.00 bps slippage, but screenshots do not prove realized spread/slippage.
raw_observation.schema_need: quote_bid, quote_ask, mark/index, fill_price, observed_at, submitted_at

evidence_gap.summary: Funding payments/rates are absent. Any position crossing a funding boundary is unresolved.

raw_observation.summary: Funding payments/rates are absent. Any position crossing a funding boundary is unresolved.

evidence_gap.summary: Several duplicate-looking rows exist, but no order IDs/trade IDs distinguish repeated fills from duplicate UI rendering.

raw_observation.summary: Several duplicate-looking rows exist, but no order IDs/trade IDs distinguish repeated fills from duplicate UI rendering.

evidence_gap.summary: Dashboard balances/PnL are visible, but deposits, withdrawals, transfers, realized PnL, funding, and equity ledger are absent.

raw_observation.summary: Dashboard balances/PnL are visible, but deposits, withdrawals, transfers, realized PnL, funding, and equity ledger are absent.

evidence_gap.schema_need: intent_id, submit_ts, accepted_ts, fill_ts, cancel_ts, status, close_reason

raw_observation.schema_need: intent_id, submit_ts, accepted_ts, fill_ts, cancel_ts, status, close_reason

evidence_gap.summary: Live controls show Armed/Disarm, but no stop-command audit proves immediate durable authority or queued-order cleanup.

raw_observation.summary: Live controls show Armed/Disarm, but no stop-command audit proves immediate durable authority or queued-order cleanup.

evidence_gap.summary: Auto-follow ON is visible, but signal source/config/control path are absent.

raw_observation.summary: Auto-follow ON is visible, but signal source/config/control path are absent.

evidence_gap.summary: ETH/ADA/SOL L2/trades/best bid-ask/mark/index data for exact March windows are missing.
evidence_gap.schema_need: event-time market data plus 5 minute padding around windows

raw_observation.summary: ETH/ADA/SOL L2/trades/best bid-ask/mark/index data for exact March windows are missing.
raw_observation.schema_need: event-time market data plus 5 minute padding around windows

evidence_gap.summary: UI liq prices/margins are visible for some positions, but true maintenance margin/equity/liquidation state is not proven.

raw_observation.summary: UI liq prices/margins are visible for some positions, but true maintenance margin/equity/liquidation state is not proven.

evidence_gap.summary: Screenshot rows show ET event times and phone clocks, but exchange/server/local timestamp normalization is absent.

raw_observation.summary: Screenshot rows show ET event times and phone clocks, but exchange/server/local timestamp normalization is absent.

evidence_gap.summary: Overlapping screenshots show same event terms with different displayed PnL in several rows.
evidence_gap.schema_need: authoritative fill ledger and immutable realized PnL

raw_observation.summary: Overlapping screenshots show same event terms with different displayed PnL in several rows.
raw_observation.schema_need: authoritative fill ledger and immutable realized PnL

evidence_gap.summary: Screenshots cover selected windows and contain clipped rows; full profitable and churn-down intervals are not present.
